zh.Trenowyth, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾特雷努斯
zh.Trenoweth Manor, Trenoweth, St. Mewan, C: 英國可瓦爾聖 梅萬
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Kelly於1362年出生在英國可瓦爾時，她的父親John Kelly16歲，母親Margaret Haskins14歲。她於1393年與Sir William Carminow在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1420年10月16日在她的家鄉享年58歲。

zh-hans.Trenoweth Manor, Trenoweth, St. Mewan, C: 英国可瓦爾聖 梅萬
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Kelly于1362年出生在英国可瓦爾时，她的父亲John Kelly16岁，母亲Margaret Haskins14岁。她于1393年与Sir William Carminow在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1420年10月16日在她的家乡享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kelly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Aileen, John Patrick, Siobhan, Liam, Brigid, Donovan, Eamon, Parnell, Aidan, Clancy.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceallaigh, or, in some areas, Mac Ceallaigh ‘descendant (or son) of Ceallach’, an ancient Irish personal name, originally a byname meaning ‘bright-headed’, later understood as ‘frequenting churches’ (Irish ceall). There are several early Irish saints who bore this name. Kelly is now the most common of all surnames in Ireland.

Scottish: habitational name from either the lands of Kelly, near Arbroath (Angus), Kellie in Carnbee (Fife), or Kelly in Methlick (Aberdeenshire). Each of these placenames is from Pictish celli or Gaelic coille ‘wood’ + the placename forming suffix -in. Alternatively, from the lands of Kelloe in the barony of Hume (Berwickshire), whose name is of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Kelley
meanings: Irish (Offaly) and English: variant of   Kelly  .

variants.name: Kilkelly
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Ceallaigh ‘son of the devotee of (Saint) Ceallach’ (see Kelly ).

variants.name: Killeen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donovan, Kieran, Liam.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cillín ‘descendant of Cillín’, a pet form of the personal name Ceallach (see Kelly ). The name was borne by various early Irish saints, including the leader of a 7th-century mission to Franconia and Thuringia, hence the popularity of the personal name Kilian in medieval central Europe.

variants.name: Kellis
meanings: Scottish: patronymic based on   Kelly   as a personal name. Compare   Kellison  .
Greek: descriptive nickname for a bald man, from kelis ‘bald’, a word of Turkish origin (from kel ‘bald’).
History: As a surname of Scottish origin, this has been established in NC since the 18th century.

variants.name: Kellison
meanings: Scottish: patronymic based on   Kelly   as a personal name.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Kelly was born in 1362, in Cornwall, England, her father, John Kelly, was 16 and her mother, Margaret Haskins, was 14. She married Sir William Carminow in 1393, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 16 October 1420, in her hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Kelly est née en 1362, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, John Kelly, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Margaret Haskins, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Carminow en 1393, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 16 octobre 1420, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Kelly 1362 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Kelly 16 und ihre Mutter Margaret Haskins 14. Sie hat 1393 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Sir William Carminow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 16. Oktober 1420 im Alter von 58 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Kelly è nata il nel 1362 nel Cornwall, England, sua padre, John Kelly, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Margaret Haskins, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Carminow nel 1393, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 16 ottobre 1420, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Kelly(이)가 1362년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Kelly(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Haskins(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1393년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Sir William Carminow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 10월 16일 그녀의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Kelly nasceu em 1362, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Kelly, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Haskins, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Carminow em 1393, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 16 de outubro de 1420, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Kelly родилась в 1362 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени John Kelly было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Haskins, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Carminow в 1393 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 16 октября 1420 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Kelly nació en 1362, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, John Kelly, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Margaret Haskins, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Sir William Carminow en 1393, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 16 de octubre de 1420, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años.
